title: Sqrilizz Headcam
description: [1.21.1-1.21.8] Revolutionary Minecraft mod that allows you to stream your webcam directly into the game! Show your face to other players in real-time, creating a unique social experience. Perfect for streamers, content creators, and social servers.
body:
# 🎥 sqrilizz HeadCam

> **Revolutionary Minecraft mod that allows you to stream your webcam directly into the game!**

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.8.9--1.21.8-green.svg)
![Server Type](https://img.shields.io/badge/Server-Paper%20%7C%20Spigot%20%7C%20-blue.svg)
![Java Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-17+-orange.svg)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)

### Right now follow me on [telegram](https://t.me/Matve1mok1) for news and if you have issues
## ✨ Key Features

### 🎮 Core Functionality
- **📹 Real-time Webcam Streaming** - Broadcast your webcam directly into Minecraft
- **🌍 In-Game Display** - See webcam feeds floating above players' heads
- **⚡ High Performance** - Optimized for smooth 60 FPS streaming
- **🔧 Easy Configuration** - Modern settings menu with intuitive controls

### 🎨 Customization Options
- **📐 Adjustable Position** - Move webcam display anywhere around your head
- **🎯 Camera Indicators** - Visual indicators for other players' cameras
- **🔇 Mute System** - Easily mute/unmute other players' webcams
- **⚙️ Display Modes** - Choose between different rendering modes
- **📏 Scale Control** - Adjust the size of webcam displays

### 🌐 Multiplayer Support
- **👥 Server Integration** - Works seamlessly with Spigot/Paper servers
- **🔄 Real-time Sync** - Webcam data syncs instantly between players
- **🎪 Social Experience** - Perfect for streaming and content creation


## 🎯 Perfect For

- **📺 Streamers** - Show your face while streaming Minecraft
- **🎬 Content Creators** - Create unique YouTube videos
- **👥 Social Servers** - Build communities with face-to-face interaction
- **🎮 Entertainment** - Add a new dimension to your server
- **🏗️ Unique Experiences** - Stand out from other servers


### Performance
- **⚡ Lightweight** - Minimal impact on game performance
- **🎯 Optimized** - Efficient network usage
- **🔄 Smooth** - 60 FPS webcam streaming
- **💾 Low Memory** - Efficient resource usage

## 🎮 How to Use

### Basic Controls
- **`. PERIOD`** - Open settings menu
- **`, COMMA`** - Open mute menu
- **Mouse** - Adjust webcam position and scale

### Settings Menu
- **📹 Webcam Selection** - Choose your webcam device
- **🎯 Camera Indicators** - Show/hide camera indicators
- **🖼️ Display Mode** - Choose rendering mode
- **📐 Position** - Adjust X, Y, Z coordinates
- **📏 Scale** - Change display size

## 🌟 Screenshots

[Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/project/sqrilizz-headcam/gallery)

## 🔧 Configuration

### Client-Side Settings
```json
{
  "webcamEnabled": true,
  "selectedWebcam": "HD WebCam",
  "cameraIndicator": "CIRCLE",
  "displayMode": "FULL_FRAME",
  "offsetX": 0.0,
  "offsetY": 100.0,
  "offsetZ": 0.0,
  "worldScale": 1.0
}
```

### Server Requirements
- **Spigot/Paper** server with sqrilizz.headcam plugin
- **Network bandwidth** for webcam data
- **Player permissions** for webcam usage


## 🤝 Community

### Support
- **📧 Issues:** Report bugs on GitHub
- **💬 Discord:** Join our community (soon)

### Contributing
We welcome contributions! Whether it's bug reports, feature suggestions, or code contributions, every bit helps make this mod better.

## 📄 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License. Feel free to use, modify, and distribute as needed.

---

**🎥 Created with ❤️ by sqrilizz**

*Experience Minecraft like never before with real-time webcam streaming!*
